job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: R Systems
Source: LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/healthcare-data-analyst-at-jobs-via-dice-4368267868

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare data analyst role with long-term duration and PST working hours.
- Calls for healthcare data analysis plus SQL, Python or R, and visualization tooling such as Tableau or Power BI.
- Strong domain relevance, but the description is broader and lighter on ETL validation specifics than Swagatika's strongest-fit roles.
strengths: Healthcare domain alignment and remote format.
Good overlap on SQL, reporting, and general analytics support.
Resume already supports Power BI/Tableau and regulated healthcare data context.
gaps: Broader general data analysis framing versus Swagatika's strongest ETL validation niche.
Python/R asked more directly than current resume depth.
notes: Moderate-fit LinkedIn lead. Emphasize healthcare analytics, SQL, reporting, and data quality support. Keep Python positioned as limited/upskilling experience only.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Data Quality | Reporting

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare and other large-scale domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for healthcare analyst roles that require clear reporting, analytics support, and dependable data accuracy.

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), stakeholder-facing reporting

validation_notes: posting date could not be verified
